description: Business letter from Avraham b. Farah in Alexandria to Yosef b. Moshe b. Barhun al-Tāhartī in Fustat. The letter mentions a shipment of cosmetic oils, lead, silk and pearls. Avraham takes care of the storage house rented by Yosef in Alexandria. He asks Yosef to buy him ink and pens in Fustat. (Information from Gil)
tags: ink, trade, pearls, al-Tahirti, material culture, silk
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מאלכסנדריה. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
